comment: 只是现行标签的一份拷贝,用作记录,与仓库标签并无同步关系

labels.name: 紧急 critical
labels.description: 最高优先级，严重影响游戏，需要立即处理 | Highest priority, game-breaking, requires immediate attention

labels.name: 重要 major
labels.description: 高优先级，需要关注 | High priority, needs attention

labels.name: 可选 optional
labels.description: 最低优先级，有更好没有也行 | Lowest priority, nice to have

labels.name: 构想 wishlist
labels.description: 尚未纳入当前开发计划的构想 | Ideas not currently planned in the development roadmap

labels.name: 错误 bug
labels.description: 不正常工作 | Something isn't working

labels.name: 增强 enhancement
labels.description: 新功能或请求 | New feature or request

labels.name: 文档 documentation
labels.description: 文档的改进或补充 | Documentation improvements

labels.name: 配置 config
labels.description: 配置改动 | Configuration changes

labels.name: 美工 artwork
labels.description: 需要美工 | Need artwork

labels.name: WIKI wiki
labels.description: Wiki 相关 | Related to wiki

labels.name: Status: 待处理 triage
labels.description: 等待维护者初步处理 | Awaiting initial review

labels.name: Status: 待补充 needs info
labels.description: 当前问题缺少必要信息，需要补充后才能处理 | Requires more information before it can be processed

labels.name: Status: 正在工作 in progress
labels.description: 进行中 | Work in progress

labels.name: Status: 已完成 completed
labels.description: 已完成 | Completed

labels.name: Status: 设计如此 by design
labels.description: 设计如此，不是缺陷 | Intended behavior

labels.name: Status: 永不修复 wontfix
labels.description: 永不修复 | Never fixed

labels.name: Status: 重复 duplicate
labels.description: 重复的问题或拉取请求 | Duplicate issue or pull request

labels.name: Status: 无效 invalid
labels.description: 无效问题 | Invalid issue

labels.name: 不要合并 do not merge
labels.description: 暂缓合并 | Hold off on merging

labels.name: 随更新合并 wait next update
labels.description: 与下一次计划更新一起合并 | Do not merge until next update

labels.name: 问题 question
labels.description: 当前问题只是关于项目的疑问 | Only a question about the project

labels.name: 新手友好 good first issue
labels.description: 适合新手解决 | Good for newcomers

labels.name: no changelog
labels.description: 当前问题或提交无需加入 Changelog | No changelog needed

labels.name: 版本过时 outdated version
labels.description: 游戏版本已过时 | Outdated version

labels.name: 格式无效 invalid format
labels.description: 问题格式无效 | Invalid issue format

labels.name: PR welcome
labels.description: 欢迎提交 PR | PR welcome

labels.name: 需要帮助 help wanted
labels.description: 这个问题或拉取请求需要其他贡献者帮助 / Needs help from other contributors

labels.name: 与核心无关 not-core
labels.description: 与核心无关 | Not related to core

labels.name: 任务 quest
labels.description: 任务相关 | Related to quest
